emails.subject: Preliminary Basis Options Spreadsheet
emails.body: Preliminary Basis Options Spreadsheet Call me with any questions. I'll send you the final version when I have the official NGI settle prices. Susan

emails.body: Re: Preliminary Basis Options Spreadsheet Could you in the future please put trade dates and book codes on the spreadsheet? Thanks!!!

emails.subject: Re: Preliminary Basis Options Spreadsheet
emails.body: The book code is ALWAYS XZ. As for trade dates, that is not one of the fields I fill in for the exotics spreadsheet and I don't think that's something we'd really want to add as the file already takes up an extremely large amout of memory. Gregory Carraway@ENRON 12/08/2000 04:45 PM
